Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake part listings, promotions, and product details to use as email content material.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot, assigns it to the target contact list, and triggers the send via the Marketing Email API.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product listings, deals, and brand messaging from the DFC website.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email with DFC-branded copy, compelling subject lines, and product-focused calls to action.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the generated email into HubSpot, targets the appropriate DFC contact lists, and sends the campaign via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures daily DFC campaigns are delivered automatically and on time, maintaining consistent customer engagement without manual effort.

R1 Support Agent.action: Retrieves new and open support tickets from HubSpot, including ticket description, customer details, and conversation history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests automatically so no ticket is missed and response times are dramatically reduced.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type (e.g., return, fitment, shipping) and drafts a context-aware reply for the support team to review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and first-draft response time from minutes to seconds, letting support agents focus on complex cases rather than repetitive replies.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI classification tag and attaches the draft reply as an internal note for agent review before sending.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the entire support workflow inside HubSpot with structured categorization, enabling faster resolution and better reporting on issue trends.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions that have been captured as HubSpot form entries or contact activities.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all Amazon customer issue data from HubSpot in one place, ensuring no return or complaint submission falls through the cracks.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each issue record into a structured Google Sheet with columns for issue type, product, date, and status for team analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and product teams a live, sortable dashboard of Amazon customer issues, enabling trend analysis and faster corrective action.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI chat agent on the R1 Concepts website, answering product questions, checking order status, and guiding purchases.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide instant 24/7 customer support, reducing support ticket volume and improving the online shopping experience for R1 customers.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will integrate with an AI model and backend systems to retrieve real-time product, inventory, and order data to power accurate conversational responses.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will eliminate wait times for common inquiries, freeing human agents for complex issues and driving higher customer satisfaction scores.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand's niche.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net across the open web to surface creator candidates that wouldn't appear through platform-only searches.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls detailed creator profiles, subscriber counts, engagement rates, content history, and contact info from YouTube, Instagram, and Google results.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds a rich, multi-platform dataset of potential creators with real performance metrics, saving hours of manual research per candidate.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and ranks discovered creators by relevance, audience fit, and content alignment using AI-driven keyword and profile analysis.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters hundreds of raw results down to a shortlist of high-potential creators, dramatically accelerating the discovery-to-outreach pipeline.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighted criteria such as audience size, engagement rate, niche relevance, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective, time-consuming manual vetting with consistent, data-driven qualification scores so only the best-fit creators move to outreach.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and brand guidelines stored in Google Drive to inform the AI outreach strategy.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach email follows proven sequences and brand-approved messaging, maintaining consistency across all creator communications.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using the learned sequences, adapting tone and offer based on creator profile.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly personalized outreach at scale, increasing response rates while eliminating the hours spent manually crafting individual emails.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails from the team Gmail account and tracks delivery status for follow-up sequencing.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the entire send-and-track workflow so outreach runs continuously without manual email composition or scheduling.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the team inbox for creator replies, extracting the full conversation thread and any new information like questions, counteroffers, or acceptances.
Creator Reponse.impact: Captures every creator response in real time so no reply goes unanswered, keeping negotiation momentum strong.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's reply using learned negotiation patterns from previous influencer email contacts and generates an appropriate follow-up response.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles routine negotiations and Q&A autonomously, dramatically reducing the time spent on back-and-forth while maintaining a professional, persuasive tone.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-generated follow-up reply via Gmail and logs the full conversation and negotiation outcome to Google Drive for team review and learning.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps the negotiation loop running automatically while building an ever-improving knowledge base of successful outreach and negotiation strategies.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying products.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Automates the entire email build-and-send process so the MHM promo goes out consistently each week without manual email assembly.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Sends a Teams notification confirming the load sheet was generated and the HubSpot email was created and scheduled successfully.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Keeps the marketing team informed in real time, enabling quick review or intervention before the email is sent.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling First to Market email copy and monthly recap content tailored to new DFC product launches using product details and launch context.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates draft First to Market and monthly recap emails in HubSpot, populating them with AI-generated copy, sales sheets, and product imagery.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email performance data for the reporting period.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes R1 Concepts keyword performance and identifies keyword gaps where competitors rank but R1 does not.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors the designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen containing the latest Super Session Saturday content.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting auto shops, distributors, and fleet operators, incorporating relevant industry keywords and technical product information.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Detects newly published Friction Friday video each week and extracts video metadata, transcript, and embed link.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts workflows including site visit triggers, welcome series, and enrollment criteria to identify redundancies and gaps.

Bomb File Project.action: Scoping requirements, defining file structure, and identifying source systems and output formats for the bomb file project.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls search performance data for DFC blog pages including impressions, clicks, average position, and top queries driving traffic.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors a designated Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and extracts the PDF files for processing.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks DFC prospect page visits across 6 Phase 1 trigger pages and enrolls visitors into corresponding automated email workflows based on the specific page viewed.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Ingests incoming customer support tickets including subject, description, priority, and customer details.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts full-month performance data across Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads including spend, revenue, conversions, and key efficiency metrics.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, and other attributes) through a HubSpot form, triggering the automation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantities, on-order quantities, and in-transit shipments.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the need for a dozen employees to perform independent inventory lookups, saving hours of redundant manual work each week and ensuring data consistency across the team.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with live inventory statuses, flags parts that have no available source (dead-end parts), and compiles a prioritized summary for review.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Provides an instant, comprehensive view of which orders can be fulfilled, which are pending, and which have no resolution path — enabling faster decision-making and proactive customer management.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor listings against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify coverage gaps and overlap opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly which fitments DFC already covers and which represent new market opportunities, giving Dino a clear picture for product expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data and interest levels for specific two-piece rotor fitments.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates market demand before committing to new part numbers, reducing inventory risk and ensuring product decisions are backed by real customer interest.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet for Dino's review.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, clean output that consolidates competitor intelligence, internal coverage analysis, and customer demand signals — ready for immediate product planning decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, extracting every text field including headlines, descriptions, and call-to-action copy for analysis.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly audits hundreds of live ads across multiple platforms without anyone manually clicking through ad managers, ensuring no ad copy goes unchecked.

Meta Investigation.action: Analyzes the extracted ad copy against specified target phrases, identifies exact matches and contextual matches, and logs the precise field and copy where each flagged phrase appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Replaces hours of manual copy review with AI-powered pattern matching that catches every instance — including subtle variations — reducing compliance risk and brand inconsistency.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted email report listing every flagged ad with the specific phrase matched, the exact field it was found in, and the full copy text for quick action.
Meta Investigation.impact: Stakeholders receive a clear, actionable report immediately upon request, enabling rapid ad copy corrections before problematic language causes compliance issues or wasted spend.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking 52 total agents — 22 completed, 12 in progress, and 18 planned — keeping us on a strong trajectory across the board. This week we added two new agents to the planned queue: **R1 Video Clipper** and **Paid Channel Chatbot**, both of which will expand our capabilities in video content and real-time paid media support. No stage changes to report this cycle, meaning our in-progress agents are still heads-down in development and we should see some movement in the coming weeks. Momentum is steady — stay tuned!
